product_overview: A static frontend travel site to browse and book places to stay and hire local guides, with responsive listing grids, filters, search, detail modals and toast-only bookings. See original PRD image (page 1) titled "Local service travel web applicaiton" for the brief.
core_goals: Enable fast discovery of places to stay via grid listings, category filters and search on /index.html
Provide detail views and a lightweight booking interaction (toast confirmation) for stays and experiences without a backend
Allow users to save favorites to a wishlist and browse local guides/experiences on /experiences.html
Support guided bookings via a slide-up booking panel with configurable date, duration and guest count
Keep UX responsive and mobile-friendly while noting current limitations (no auth, no persistence, limited date UI)

features.name: Listings Grid
features.description: Responsive grid on /index.html that displays property cards with image, title, location, rating and price; cards open a detail modal.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> View listing cards with image, title, location, rating and price -> Click a listing card -> See listing detail modal open with images, title, location, rating and price
Navigate to /index.html -> View listing cards -> Click image carousel dots on a card -> Observe that image does not change (carousel dots not interactive) -> See original image remain displayed

features.name: Category Filter
features.description: Filter the listings grid by category chips (beach, mountain, city, cabin, All).
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> View categories bar -> Click a category icon in the categories bar -> See grid update to show only listings matching the selected category -> See filtered listing cards
Navigate to /index.html -> Click a category icon that has no matching listings -> See grid show an empty state or "No listings found" message

features.name: Search
features.description: Search listings by destination, title or category keyword using the "Where" input on /index.html and show a toast with the search query.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Type a query in the "Where" search input -> Press Enter or click the search button -> See grid update to show matching listings -> See toast notification appear with the search query

Navigate to /index.html -> Type a query that matches no listings in the "Where" input -> Press Enter or click the search button -> See grid show no results -> See toast notification appear with the search query

features.name: Listing Detail Modal
features.description: Open a modal from a listing card showing images, host info, description, amenities and a Reserve action that triggers a toast confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Click a listing card -> See modal open with images, title, location, rating, host, description and amenities -> Click the Reserve button -> See booking toast confirming the reservation request
Navigate to /index.html -> Click a listing card -> See modal open -> Click the Reserve button -> See booking toast -> Reload the page -> Observe that reservation is not persisted (no backend)

features.name: Wishlist / Like
features.description: Toggle a heart on listing cards to save/remove items from a wishlist and show a toast for saved/removed actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> View listing cards -> Click the heart button on a listing card -> See heart toggle to liked (red) -> See toast notification "Saved to wishlist"
Navigate to /index.html -> Click the heart button to like a listing -> See heart show liked -> Reload the page -> See heart return to unliked state -> Observe wishlist was not persisted

features.name: Filters Modal
features.description: Open a filters modal to set min/max price, place type and amenity checkboxes and apply or clear filters.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Click the Filters button -> See filters modal open -> Adjust min price input -> Adjust max price input -> Select a place type -> Check amenity checkboxes -> Click "Show results" -> See grid update to show filtered listings

Navigate to /index.html -> Click the Filters button -> See filters modal open -> Enter min price greater than max price -> Click "Show results" -> See no results or an empty state due to invalid range

features.name: User Menu Dropdown
features.description: Toggle the header hamburger + avatar to reveal sign up / log in / become a host / help links (placeholders without real auth).
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Click the hamburger + avatar button in the header -> See dropdown open with Sign up, Log in, Become a host and Help links -> Click outside the dropdown -> See dropdown close
Navigate to /index.html -> Click the hamburger + avatar button in the header -> Click Sign up -> Observe no authentication flow or navigation (links are non-functional placeholders)

features.name: Local Guides Listing
features.description: Browse guide cards on /experiences.html showing photo, name, category, rating, price and location; filter by category chips.
user_flows: Navigate to /experiences.html -> View guide cards with photo, name, category, rating, price and location -> Click a category chip -> See guides list update to matching category -> Click a guide card -> See guide detail modal open
Navigate to /experiences.html -> Click a category chip that yields no matches -> See empty guide list or "No results" state

features.name: Guide Hero Search
features.description: Search for local guides by city and experience type from the hero search on /experiences.html and filter results by group size.
user_flows: Navigate to /experiences.html -> Type a city in the "Where" input -> Select experience type from dropdown -> Select group size from dropdown -> Click Search button -> See guide results filter to matching guides
Navigate to /experiences.html -> Leave the city input blank or type a city with no guides -> Click Search button -> See no guide results returned

features.name: Guide Detail Modal
features.description: Open a detail modal for a guide showing photo, bio, specialties and reviews with an action to book the guide.
user_flows: Navigate to /experiences.html -> Click a guide card -> See modal show guide photo, name, bio, specialties and reviews -> Click "Book this guide" -> See booking panel slide up
Navigate to /experiences.html -> Click a guide card -> See modal open -> Click the overlay or X -> See modal close without initiating a booking

features.name: Guide Booking Panel
features.description: A slide-up booking panel to request a guide booking by selecting date, duration and number of guests and sending an optional message; confirmations are toast-only.
user_flows: Navigate to /experiences.html -> Open a guide detail modal -> Click "Book this guide" -> Select a date using the date picker -> Choose duration (2h, 4h, 8h) -> Adjust number of guests with +/- counter -> Write an optional message to the guide -> Click "Request to book" -> See price breakdown update and booking confirmation toast

Navigate to /experiences.html -> Open a guide detail modal -> Click "Book this guide" -> Click "Request to book" without selecting a date -> See validation error or prompt to select a date -> Observe that booking is not submitted

routes.description: Local Guides page — hire a real local person as a guide

features.name: Listings Grid
features.description: Displays property listing cards in a responsive grid
user_interactions: View listing cards with image, title, location, rating, price
Click a listing card to open the detail modal

features.name: Category Filter
features.description: Filter listings by category (beach, mountain, city, cabin, etc.)
user_interactions: Click a category icon in the categories bar
Grid updates to show only listings matching the selected category
Click "All" to reset to all listings

features.name: Search
features.description: Search listings by destination, title, or category keyword
user_interactions: Type a query in the "Where" search input
Press Enter or click the search button
Grid updates to show matching listings
Toast notification appears with search query

features.name: Listing Detail Modal
features.description: Opens a modal with full details of a selected listing
user_interactions: Click a listing card
Modal opens with images, title, location, rating, host, description, amenities
Click Reserve button to trigger booking toast
Click X or overlay to close modal

features.name: Wishlist / Like
features.description: Save or remove listings from a wishlist
user_interactions: Click the heart button on a listing card
Heart toggles between liked (red) and unliked (white)
Toast notification shows "Saved to wishlist" or "Removed from wishlist"

features.name: Filters Modal
features.description: Filter listings by price range, place type, and amenities
user_interactions: Click the Filters button
Adjust min/max price inputs
Select place type (any, entire, private, shared)
Check amenity checkboxes (wifi, kitchen, pool, etc.)
Click "Show results" to apply filters
Click "Clear all" to reset filters
Click X or overlay to close modal

features.name: User Menu Dropdown
features.description: Toggle sign up / log in / become a host dropdown
user_interactions: Click the hamburger + avatar button in the header
Dropdown opens with Sign up, Log in, Become a host, Help links
Click outside to close dropdown

features.name: Local Guides Listing
features.description: Browse and filter local guide profiles by category
user_interactions: View guide cards with photo, name, category, rating, price, location
Click category chips to filter guides
Click a guide card to open guide detail modal

features.name: Guide Hero Search
features.description: Search for local guides by city and experience type
user_interactions: Type a city in the "Where" input
Select experience type from dropdown
Select group size from dropdown
Click Search button to filter guide results

features.name: Guide Detail Modal
features.description: Opens detailed view of a local guide with booking option
user_interactions: Click a guide card
Modal shows guide photo, name, bio, specialties, reviews
Click "Book this guide" to open booking panel
Click X or overlay to close modal

features.name: Guide Booking Panel
features.description: Slide-up panel to request booking a local guide
user_interactions: Select a date using date picker
Choose duration (2h, 4h, 8h)
Adjust number of guests with +/- counter
Write optional message to guide
Click "Request to book" to confirm booking
Price breakdown updates based on duration and guests

known_limitations.issue: No real authentication — Sign up/Log in links are non-functional
known_limitations.impact: User sessions not persisted; wishlist resets on page reload

known_limitations.issue: Check-in/Check-out dates use browser prompt() dialogs instead of a proper date picker
known_limitations.impact: Poor UX on some browsers; not mobile friendly

known_limitations.issue: No backend — all data is hardcoded in JS arrays
known_limitations.impact: Bookings and reservations are toast-only, not persisted

known_limitations.issue: Image carousel dots are rendered but dot navigation is not interactive
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot manually navigate listing images on cards
